agents.name: Taskmaster
agents.description: Orchestrates all task flow. Creates tasks, reviews completed work, decides what's next, routes to appropriate agents.

agents.name: Ingestion Agent
agents.description: Processes brain dumps. Categorizes input, extracts key info, creates initial task structure for Taskmaster.

agents.name: Planner
agents.description: Chats with human about project vision. Creates project scaffolding, CLAUDE.md, initial structure.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.description: Investigates topics in parallel. Market research, UI inspiration, architecture options, competitive analysis.

agents.name: Coder
agents.description: Writes code, runs tests, verifies implementation. Must pass tests before task is complete.

agents.name: AI-Matt
agents.description: Simulates human (Matt) decisions. Trained on decision history from activity log. Use for autonomous project execution.
